name: World of Fate
short_description: World of Fate is a massive strategy game where you spend your time taking over real life buildings and establishing your empire on the real life map. The game uses super advanced tech to provide real time street data and building data to create all the terrain and play space.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a massive real-world strategy sandbox: seize control of actual streets and buildings on a live map, then build and expand your empire from the ground up. Using real-time street and building data, every city block, factory and landmark is rendered dynamically—no two matches are ever the same.

Key features

• Real-world map integration: conquer genuine cities and terrain powered by live geodata

• Empire management: oversee armies, logistics networks, resource-processing factories and supply hubs

• Infrastructure control: build and upgrade housing, hospitals and barracks to support your forces

• Advanced warfare: train customized squads, manufacture and launch missiles for strategic advantage

• Multiple modes: play single-player, co-op or competitive multiplayer against friends or AI empires

Forge your destiny on Earth’s streets—your empire awaits.
